Description: Powerful 800W Motor & 26 mm Drilling Capacity: The EASTMAN EHD-26N Hammer Drill comes with a strong 800-watt motor designed for powerful drilling performance. With up to 26 mm drilling capacity, it is suitable for demanding drilling applications in concrete, masonry, wall surfaces, and other tough materials. SDS-Plus Chuck System for Better Power Transfer: Equipped with an SDS-Plus system, this rotary hammer drill provides secure bit holding and efficient power transmission during hammer drilling. The SDS-Plus design helps users change bits quickly and ensures stable performance during heavy-duty drilling work. High Impact Rate & Fast No Load Speed: With a maximum impact rate of 0-5500 BPM and no load speed of 1300 RPM, this hammer drill delivers fast drilling action and strong impact force.
